title: Building a state of the art Algo x AI hybrid trading app with a full reasoning flow and trading engine underneath. AMA
author: StevenVinyl

comments.author: No-Eagle-547
comments.body: What makes it state of the art?

replies.author: No-Eagle-547
replies.body: Ok that's actually a funny response

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body:
That is a funny one, although on a serious note, it's the only app with a fully fledged trading engine underneath.

Set up an easy task/goal with a prompt (whatever that is), set up algo triggers (could be price, indicators, combine them in a and/or order. This triggers the task -> llm just reasons through it (can be as complex as you want and with as many checks), injects your main trading strat as well in the run and at the end, based on all that data decider whether to execute that trade or not. 

And this is just one of the features of the app... there's trading through chat (no need to confirm), chart analysis by the models, copy trading coming up, etc... 

[https://app.cod3x.org/](https://app.cod3x.org/)

replies.author: Patient-Bumblebee
replies.body: How does this compare to Everstrike which basically does all of that but is also a DEX?
